questionHtml:
0.02 mol of zinc is added to 10.0 cm3 of 1.0 mol dm–3 hydrochloric acid.

Zn (s) + 2HCl (aq) → ZnCl2 (aq) + H2 (g)

How many moles of hydrogen are produced?

A.  0.005

B.  0.01

C.  0.02

D.  0.04

meta.title: 0.02 mol of zinc is added to 10.0 cm3 of 1.0 mol dm–3 hydrochloric acid. Zn (s) + 2HCl (aq) → ZnCl2 (aq) + H2 (g) How many moles of hydrogen are produced? A. 0.005 B. 0.01 C. 0.02
